title: Zudoku Theme Configuration
description: Schema for the Zudoku theme and branding configuration that customizes colors, fonts, logos, and dark mode settings for the generated documentation portal.

fonts.description: Font family configuration for different text elements.

code.description: Font family for code blocks and inline code.

ThemeColors.description: Color palette for a theme mode.

primary.description: Primary brand color in CSS format.

primaryForeground.description: Foreground color used on primary backgrounds.

secondaryForeground.description: Foreground color used on secondary backgrounds.
